title: NVIDIA GTC 2025 - Building LLM-Powered Applications

· 1 min read
Chip and I were invited to speak on a panel at NVIDIA GTC 2025, titled “Insights and Lessons Learned From Building LLM-Powered Applications”. The recording is live on the NVIDIA GTC attendee portal; you’ll need to log in to view it. to the general public via NVIDIA On-Demand.
If you found this useful, please cite this write-up as:
